Name: Crimson Education
Tagline: Crimson Education US offers personalized college admissions consulting with proven results for students applying to the Ivy League & top universities
About: See Our Record-Breaking Class of 2030 Results!View Now Empower ambitious students to reach their dream universities Empower ambitious students to reach their dream universities We support students applying to the Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, UChicago, Duke, and other top US universities. With 1,340+ Ivy League offers and former admissions officers on our team, Crimson delivers proven, expert guidance for ambitious students.
Philosophy: Devery studied higher education management at Harvard's Graduate School of Education in addition to serving as a Harvard admissions officer, UC Berkeley application reader, and an application reader for a top liberal arts college. Applying a strategic, data-driven approach, Devery helps students make informed choices as they tailor applications to Ivy League institutions.
Outcomes: Hundreds of Crimson students have been admitted to top colleges, including every Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, Duke, Johns Hopkins and more. Crimson students are seeing strong 2030 results, with offers from leading colleges including Harvard, Yale, and Stanford.
Admissions: To apply to Crimson Education, students typically start with a consultation to assess their goals and needs. Applications are accepted year-round, with personalized plans tailored to each student's timeline and target universities.
Quote: Culture in two words: infectious joy. At Crimson, you never work alone - you tap a collaborative brain trust of hundreds, aligning expertise around your goals and cheering your progress.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: “Hi, I’m Collier — former Harvard QB, 3x Ivy League Champion, and All-American Honorable Mention.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: “Swimming taught me discipline, balance, and leadership — lessons I carried from Dartmouth, where I captained the team, to mentoring student-athletes today.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Admits to MA, MSc, MEng, and PhDs at Stanford, Georgia Tech, Imperial, UCLA, and top global tech universities.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Crimson Education provides personalized counseling and advisory systems to support students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Community-building initiatives foster peer connections, creating a supportive environment for students throughout their college admissions journey.
Performance.Academic Integration: Crimson Education offers a tailored curriculum focusing on strategic application techniques and critical thinking. Expert-led workshops and one-on-one mentoring sessions help students develop skills needed for top university admissions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Crimson Education utilizes detailed progress reports and regular feedback sessions to track student advancement. Parents receive consistent updates, ensuring transparency and collaboration in the student's educational journey.
